meta.title: Mixed-Ligand Complexes of Platinum(II) as Curing Agents for pBR322 and pBR329 (ColE1) Plasmids in Escherichia coli

abstractHtml: Summary: The mixed-ligand complexes of platinum(II) [Pt(Gly)(uracil)Cl2], H2O and [Pt(His)(adenine)]-CI.2H2O eliminated multicopy plasmids with the ColE1 origin of replication in Escherichia coli with 100% frequency. However, plasmids of the IncF1, H1 and X groups were totally refractory to these agents under similar conditions.
